title: I Love You for Him/Her Balloons 31PCS Gold 18 Inch Heart Balloons Banner Romantic Decoration Kit for Valentines Party Wedding Engagement Galentines Day Bridal Shower Anniversary Decor
features: Package Includes: You will receive 'I LOVE YOU' letter foil balloons, 10 X 18 inch gold heart balloons, 3 X 18 inch silver heart balloons, 10 X 10 inch gold heart balloonsand a straw in sufficient quantity to meet your decoration needs. It is the perfect supplement to your party decoration, bringing surprises to guests and having a pleasant party time.

High Quality Material: Our proposal balloons are made of high-quality aluminum foil material, which is safe and environmentally friendly, not easy to crack and fade, has a glossy and beautiful shape, is lightweight, easy to hang and carry, and has a self sealing design that can be reused, adding a strong sweet atmosphere to your party

Perfect Party Decoration: This exquisite set of confession balloons can add a touch of romance to your decoration, creating a wonderful and unforgettable proposal or confession occasion through the eye-catching words' I LOVE YOU '

Easy to Use: Simply use a straw or air pump to inflate the balloon. After filling, flatten the expansion port and automatically seal it without air leakage. It is easy to use and is a good choice for party decoration

Wide Application: Our Valentine's Day balloons are perfect for various celebration activities, including birthday parties, wedding, Valentine's Day decorations, bridal showers, Engagement parties and more. They are also very suitable for balloon bouquets, balloon arches, home and table decorations, wedding aisle decorations, photo backgrounds, party supplies, and other activities.
description: Product description These 16 inch 'I LOVE YOU' Balloons Kit are perfect for Valentines Day, Weddings, Engagements, Bridal Showers, Birthday Parties, or any other romantic occasion. The balloons are made of high-quality foil, and are self-sealing, so you can fill them with air or helium without the need for a sealant. The balloons are also reusable, and can be filled with air again for future use. The balloons are available in a variety of colors, including red, pink, and rose gold, and are perfect for creating a romantic and festive atmosphere. The balloons are easy to assemble, and can be hung from ceilings, walls, or windows. They are also a great way to add a touch of color to any party or event. Safety Warning Please make the balloons stay away from pointed object and fire.
